enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of the song 24 Hours from the movie Yuvan Yuvathi, featuring the melodious voice of Haricharan. Composed by the talented Vijay Antony, this track combines rhythmic beats with catchy lyrics by Annamalai. Dive into this musical journey that perfectly encapsulates youthful exuberance and modern vibes.
stanzaMeanings: Song: 24 Hours, Singer: Haricharan, Lyrics: Annamalai, Movie: Yuvan Yuvathi, Music: Vijay Antony.
[Hands up everybody, hands up - aai Hands up everybody, hands up] (2)
Come and dance, turn off your worries, dance up. When you hear the music, raise your hands. Are you steady? Raise your hands. Everybody, raise your hands.

Hey... 24 hours, youthfulness doesn't suit here. Seeing an American girl, our local style doesn't appeal. The world is beautiful, and it takes a deep breath to adapt. Even if you lock them up, their dance won't stop.
Hands up everybody, hands up - aai Hands up everybody, hands up.
The phase seeking joy, the restless beauty of women. Like a time bomb, their hearts explode. Life comes here; we don't need renunciation. Relationships without light, nights repeat endlessly.
Hands up everybody, hands up... 24 hours, youthfulness doesn't suit here. Seeing an American girl, our local style doesn't appeal. Hey...
Drink coffee, sing a song, do what your heart desires. Grab it, like lightning in the sky. Be ready to endure, to withstand.
Hands up everybody, hands up... Life is a blessing, let the heart dance. Each date is a youthful day. The heart is like a pot, an empty space. Let it search for happiness.
Yesterday and tomorrow are all dreams. Live today as you wish. The days that run, let them match our time. Don't hesitate, search for a job.
24 hours... Hands up everybody, hands up... Hands up everybody, hands up - aai Hands up everybody, hands up.
Platinum statue, the net of glances. The head spins in the gaze's intoxication. The sunbeam burns, the heat waves act, taking life.
Tight dress, slim waist, the heart trembles, a thrilling force. Break the silence, block the desire. Between the eyes, place a barrier.
The beauty of blooming flowers, when seen, the heart flutters. Even if you say no, it grows like a mustache. Desire extends.

24 hours, youthfulness doesn't suit here. Seeing an American girl, our local style doesn't appeal. The world is beautiful, and it takes a deep breath to adapt. Even if you lock them up, their dance won't stop.
